key.name: notifications
key.description: Whether notification showed on copying to clipboard actions

key.name: copy-icons
key.description: Whether or not the copy icons is displayed in the secret keys list

key.name: menu-label-order
key.description: A list of label order, username, issuer and code with active statuses

key.name: dynamic-menu-ratio
key.description: Sets a percentage value between 20 and 80 for the UI layout.
